___comment_2___: Modify these settings to run any HuggingFace LLM on any PC
___comment_3___: This config works with ANY model - just change the model name!

model.name: openai/gpt-oss-120b
_comment_name: HuggingFace model ID - CHANGE THIS to run any model!
model._comment_revision: Model version/branch - use 'main' for latest, or specific commit hash
_comment_trust_remote_code: Set to true ONLY for models that require custom code execution
WARNING: Only enable if you trust the model author
Most models work fine with false
_comment_use_auth_token: Set to your HuggingFace token for gated models
Required for: Llama-2, Llama-3, and other gated models

_comment_type: - 'fp16': Half precision (16-bit float) - RECOMMENDED for most GPUs
- 'bf16': Bfloat16 (16-bit brain float) - Better for Ampere+ GPUs (RTX 30xx+)
- 'fp32': Full precision (32-bit float) - Maximum quality, DOUBLE memory usage
- This tool does NOT use 8-bit or 4-bit quantization
- Full precision is maintained for quality
- Memory is saved via DeepSpeed ZeRO-3 offloading instead
_comment_fp16_vs_bf16: - FP16: Works on all CUDA GPUs, smaller memory footprint
- BF16: Better numerical stability, requires Ampere+ (RTX 30xx, A100, etc.)
- BF16 has larger dynamic range, less prone to overflow/underflow

_comment_vram_safety_margin_gb: GB to reserve for system overhead
This prevents OOM during model loading spikes
Formula: Usable VRAM = Total VRAM - Safety Margin
_comment_max_vram_usage_percent: Maximum percentage of usable VRAM to utilize
_comment_cpu_offload: Offload optimizer states to CPU RAM
Should always be true for large models
_comment_nvme_offload: ESSENTIAL for models larger than VRAM+RAM
Data flow: SSD → CPU buffer → GPU
Requires fast SSD/NVMe for reasonable performance

_comment_offload_path: ENSURE THIS DIRECTORY HAS ENOUGH DISK SPACE!
Use your fastest storage (NVMe SSD preferred)
_comment_buffer_size_gb: Larger buffer = faster loading but more RAM usage
Reduce if you have limited system RAM
_comment_buffer_count: Number of buffers for parallel offloading

_comment_enabled: Enable swap file creation for additional memory
Swap is used when RAM is insufficient
Slower than RAM but allows larger models
_comment_path: Ensure this is on your fastest storage
Swap file will be created and removed automatically
_comment_size_gb: Set to 'auto' to calculate based on model size

_comment_temperature: 0.7 is a good balance for general use
_comment_top_p: Keeps top tokens with cumulative probability <= top_p
0.9 is standard, reduce for more focused output
_comment_top_k: Only sample from top k tokens
_comment_repetition_penalty: 1.1-1.2 is standard for most use cases
Increase (1.3-1.5) for long generations to avoid repetition
_comment_do_sample: Whether to use sampling (vs greedy decoding)
false = greedy (always pick most likely token)

poem_example.prompt: HI generate 500 lines of random words poem as each word is 50 letters as line consists of 15 words
poem_example._comment: Example from user request - generates very long output

story_example.prompt: Write a short story about a robot learning to paint.

code_example.prompt: Write a Python function to calculate the Fibonacci sequence.

_comment_cleanup_interval: Lower values = more frequent cleanup but slower
_comment_stream_output: Stream output as tokens are generated

___quick_start___: 1. CHANGE 'model.name' to your desired HuggingFace model ID
- RTX 30xx/40xx: can use 'bf16' for better stability
- Want max quality and have memory: use 'fp32'
